0122212112002010001111022021020010110000 - ASI: 27

Rules:
  00 = 0 * 0
  10 = 1 * 0
  11 = 1 * 1
  12 = 1 * 2
  20 = 2 * 0
  101 = 10 * 1
  102 = 10 * 2
  112 = 1 * 12
  122 = 12 * 2
  202 = 20 * 2
  212 = 2 * 12
  0020 = 00 * 20
  0122 = 0 * 122
  1000 = 10 * 00
  1102 = 1 * 102
  00101 = 00 * 101
  10000 = 1000 * 0
  100011 = 1000 * 11
  202102 = 202 * 102
  212112 = 212 * 112
  0010110000 = 00101 * 10000
  0020100011 = 0020 * 100011
  0122212112 = 0122 * 212112
  1102202102 = 1102 * 202102
  01222121120020100011 = 0122212112 * 0020100011
  11022021020010110000 = 1102202102 * 0010110000
  0122212112002010001111022021020010110000 = 01222121120020100011 * 11022021020010110000
